name: YouTube Watch History (Recent)
description: Most recent watch history entries (top 50) collected from the YouTube History page.

watchedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) resolved from the section date header at scrape time; null when the header was missing or unrecognized

watchedAtText.description: Section date header e.g. Today, Yesterday, Jan 23 2026

views.description: Raw view count text e.g. '97k views'

description.description: Short video description snippet shown in history
